2292880.name: The City: Superhero Flying Experience
2292880.description:
Embark on an extraordinary journey of heroism and flight in "The City: Superhero Flying Experience," a groundbreaking video game that transports the player into a breathtaking urban playground. As you step into the shoes of this iconic figure, the entire metropolis becomes your canvas, a sprawling playground of towering skyscrapers, bustling streets, and hidden alleyways awaiting your airborne prowess. With the wind rushing past, you'll ascend to new heights, effortlessly gliding through the city's intricate skyline, and performing jaw-dropping aerial acrobatics that showcase your mastery over gravity.

Press "F" to activate flight mode.

Press "M" to open configuration options.
Note: You can set the flight speed in the configuration menu.
Press "1", "2" to cycle between flight poses.
